protocol.prompt: Write four short bullet points about local MoE inference on a laptop.
protocol.without: transformers · CPU · float16 · greedy decode loop
protocol.windhover: default windhover-engine (KPK mmap + CATS + int8 KV)
protocol.legacy: WH=0 dense.c path when pack still loads

runs.text:
- Install the latest version of TensorFlow or PyTorch.
- Download the pre-trained model from the MoE website.
- Configure the environment variables for GPU acceleration
runs.stderr_tail:
[OMP] hot-thread tuning: re-exec once (COLI_NO_OMP_TUNE=1 to skip)
[wh] CATS sparsity on: target 25% (calibrated taus)
[wh] /home/ubuntu/.windhover/models/Qwen__Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B-Instruct/kpk | qwen2 L=28 D=1536 I=8960 | 1.02 GB pack | load 0.00s | footprint 0.42 GB
[wh] prefill 43 tok in 1.64s (26.3 tok/s)
[wh] decode 15.38 tok/s (32 tok, 31 fwd) | prefill 26.3 tok/s | RSS 1.03 GB | footprint 1.03 GB
[wh] sparsity 22.8% | ~0.92 GB/tok | au hot=6001086 cold_fetch=0 cold_drop=0 (0.0%) saved=3.07GB | weights=1.02GB total=1.02GB budget=0.00GB
